item.title: MiCA 2.0: The End of Regulatory Uncertainty in Europe
item.description: The European Union's latest framework provides the clarity institutional investors needed.

item.title: Solana Firedancer: Matching Nasdaq's Execution Speed
item.description: Solana has become the premier choice for high-frequency trading on-chain.

item.title: BlackRock IBIT: Analyzing the Shift to Permanent Allocation
item.description: Institutional portfolio management is undergoing a structural change with Bitcoin ETFs.
